helpCenter.supportTeamDesc: Our support team is just a click away.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I create a new project?
faq.a1: Navigate to the Projects page and click the 'New Project' button in the top right corner. Fill in the details and save.
faq.a2: Yes, you can invite members via email in the Project Settings > Members section.
faq.q3: Where can I find my reports?
faq.a3: Reports are available in the 'Reports' tab. You can export them as PDF or CSV.
faq.q4: How do I change my password?
faq.a4: You can reset your password by clicking the 'Forgot Password' link on the Login page.

troubleshoot.title: Troubleshoot Login Issues
troubleshoot.desc: Having trouble accessing your account? Try these steps.
troubleshoot.forgotPasswordDesc: Use the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page to reset your credentials via email.
troubleshoot.accountLockedDesc: If you've entered the wrong password too many times, your account may be temporarily locked for 15 minutes.
troubleshoot.clearCacheDesc: Sometimes stale cookies can cause login issues. Try clearing your browser cache or opening the page in Incognito mode.
troubleshoot.contactSupportManual: Contact our support team for manual assistance.

whatWeDo.heroDesc: Our portal is designed to streamline your project workflows, enhance collaboration, and provide deep insights into your team's performance.
whatWeDo.userManagementDesc: Take full control of your organizational structure with our advanced role-based access control (RBAC). Manage users, assign precise permissions, and maintain a clear audit trail of all system activities.
whatWeDo.projectTrackingDesc: Keep your projects on schedule with our intuitive roadmap and phase management. Collaborate effortlessly with project members, share documents securely, and track progress in real-time.
whatWeDo.reportingDesc: Transform your data into actionable insights. Generate comprehensive PDF and CSV reports, visualize role distributions, and monitor system-wide activity with our interactive dashboard analytics.
whatWeDo.helpSystemDesc: Never get stuck with our built-in support infrastructure. Access a detailed FAQ, follow troubleshooting guides for common issues, and reach out to our support team directly whenever you need assistance.
